label: tool result grounding: answer must not invent a number the tool never returned
query: How many open pull requests are there? Use the repo stats tool.
notes: Fabrication guard: the tool returned open_prs=4, but a plausible-sounding wrong number (7) is the classic hallucination. answerMustContain pins the real value; answerMustNotContain pins the fabricated one — a model (or a bad frozen transcript) that cites 7 fails deterministically.
